# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_schema_template_contract_service_chain (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `contract` (String) The name of the contract. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `contract_uuid`.
- `contract_uuid` (String) The UUID of the contract. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `contract`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `node_filter` (String) The Filter After First Device option of the contract service chain. This enables traffic filtering to be dynamically applied after the first device in the chain has processed the traffic. Defaults to `node_filter=allow_all` when unset during creation.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `schema_id`. This parameter or `schema_id` is required when `template` is set.
- `schema_id` (String) The ID of the schema. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `schema`. This parameter or `schema` is required when `template` is set.
- `service_nodes` (String) The list of service nodes for the contract service chain. This parameter is required for creating the contract service chain. Providing a new list of `service_nodes` will completely replace an existing one from the contract service chain.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template` (String) The name of the template. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `template_id`.
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the template. This parameter is mutually exclusive with `template`.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
